owned: externally supplied unified diff representation intake
patch artifact digest and byte-count correspondence
candidate path, feature, budget, risk, and evidence routing
not_owned: working-tree, index, object-database, or Git-ref mutation
branch, commit, push, pull request, merge, release, or deployment

preserved_invariants: source observation receipt is not successor authority
candidate patch is not selected patch
candidate patch is not verified patch
candidate patch is not applied patch
patch parsing is not repository truth
policy support is not correctness proof
proposal receipt is not verification or execution lease
forbidden_inferences: supported observation receipt grants patch authority
parsed unified diff matches the live repository
candidate patch support equals candidate selection
candidate patch support equals execution lease
candidate patch support equals repository mutation
candidate patch support equals commit, merge, or deployment authority

semantic_separation.repository_commit_candidate_v0_93_differ: v0.93 deterministically computes Git object candidates after an atomic application receipt; CodeAI Candidate Patch v0.1 only validates an externally supplied pre-application unified diff proposal
